title: thebasics:thebasics-handbook-title-teleportation
text: Teleportation collects The BASICs' non-request teleport tools. Server config controls privileges, warmups, cooldowns, temporal gear costs, and safety gates. Staff can inspect and adjust live settings with /thebasics config; most teleport settings are live reloadable and do not require a server restart. Command registration settings are restart-required because Vintage Story does not expose live command deregistration. Homes - /sethome: save your default home. - /sethome <name>: save a named home. - /home: return to your default home. - /home <name>: return to a named home. - /homes: list saved homes. - /delhome <name>: delete a saved home. Use /delhome default for your default home. Spawn - /spawn: teleport to The BASICs spawn, or to the world's default spawn if staff have not set one. - /setspawn: staff command that sets The BASICs spawn destination without changing vanilla respawn behavior. Back - /back: return to the spot recorded before your last server-side teleport. It stores one previous location and expires after the configured window. A successful /back records the place you left, so repeated /back uses can move between the two latest teleport locations after any configured cooldown. This first pass only supports same-dimension return locations. The recorder catches The BASICs teleports, accepted TPA teleports, and vanilla teleports that go through the normal player teleport path. Top and stuck - /top: teleport to a safe surface above your current vertical column, checking adjacent columns if needed. - /stuck: slow emergency teleport to spawn. It can remind the waiting player, notify staff, and optionally refuse to run while another online player has the configured help/admin privilege. Set that block privilege empty to always allow /stuck. Warmups and cancellation When warmups are enabled, stand still until the teleport completes. Moving, taking damage, or interacting can cancel the warmup depending on config. Cooldowns start after a successful teleport. Temporal gear requirements are checked before warmup and consumed only when the teleport completes. Command conflicts If another mod should own one of these command names, disable the relevant Teleportation.Register... setting and restart the server before The BASICs registers it.
